subcodes.first_line: O thou who worshippest God, Imam-Qulí - which signifieth servant of the Imam - what a goodly name is this, which causeth one to soar aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدا پرست امام قلى یعنى بنده امام چه نام خوش این نام که سبب پریدن ببام
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
